name: Vulners — vulnerability intelligence (search / id / audit)
description: Queries the Vulners (vulners.com) vulnerability-intelligence database and imports the results as VULNERABILITY findings. Modes: 'search' (a Vulners Lucene query or product+version), 'id' (fetch a specific CVE/bulletin), and 'audit' (a Linux host: OS + version + installed packages -> the CVEs that affect them, Vulners' agentless package audit). Each result becomes a VULN enriched with CVSS, the referenced CVE(s), exploit availability and a fix where Vulners provides one; the audit target host becomes an ASSET. Requires a Vulners API key (param 'apiKey' or env VULNERS_API_KEY); for offline use, pass a saved Vulners JSON response via 'file'. Read-only import (no DB access in run.py, worker-safe). Complements the in-app /vuln-assessment (which audits a software inventory against XORCISM's own enriched store).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.help: search | id | audit (default: search, or audit when os+packages are given).

parameters.name: query
parameters.help: search: a Vulners Lucene query or product, e.g. 'affectedSoftware.name:openssl' or 'type:exploit log4j'.

parameters.name: cve
parameters.help: id: a CVE / Vulners bulletin id, e.g. CVE-2021-44228.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.help: Vulners API key (or set env VULNERS_API_KEY).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: path to a saved Vulners JSON response to normalise instead of calling the API.
